chapters.title: Transform your fears into faith
chapters.text:
Each of us needs support from time to time. Maybe you had a stressful day or even week and want someone to cheer you up. Sometimes, we cannot reach our friends or loved ones for reconciliation. What to do in such cases? You can help yourself by using specific recommendations which you can read in moments of despair or melancholy. But first, you have to eliminate your fear of loneliness, failure, talking to strangers, spiders (doesn't refer to you Australians), or that someone doesn't like you.

Any fear that you have right now won't help you move further. Do you know what will help instead? Faith. Transform your scare into a conviction that you will manage to cope with everything life sends you. For example, don't think, “This person won't like me because I'm (the list of your negative thoughts about yourself),” consider this instead, “This person will like me because I'm (list of your positive thoughts about yourself), and even if they don't, it doesn't mean that I'm a bad person.”

Next, remind yourself that you cannot control everything in this world. No one can. But what you are capable of is handling your actions, attitudes, and efforts. Even if a specific situation seems unfair to you, try to shift your focus to hard work and caring about yourself.

Greatness isn't achieved by worrying what everyone thinks of you. ~ Jon Gordon, Daniel Decker

Concentrate on yourself, keep positive things in your head, and act. Now is the best time for getting things done. But where to start? Switch off the noise—people who emit negativity, those who say that you can't achieve something, and individuals who always find obstacles on your way to success. The only things that matter are coming from within your heart. While socializing with others and pursuing a hobby, stop and listen—how do you feel? Are you excited and absorbed or frustrated and not involved in your actions or conversations? Do you feel like energy flows into you or, vice versa, you lose it?

The less you give up, the stronger and more flexible character you develop.

After reading this book, you will feel much better about yourself and your life. You will learn how to save yourself from sadness and apathy. Your source of energy will be renewed, giving you more motivation to pursue your goals. The magic has always been inside you; this book simply shows you how to find it.

chapters.title: You cannot control everything, but you can control yourself
chapters.text:
Many people feel vulnerable when realizing that they can't control numerous things in their lives, including other people's emotions and opinions. You probably faced such situations when a person told you that you were not likely to deal with something, like a test, complex exercise, quitting bad habits, etc. In such moments, people frequently listen to such judgments and start believing that they are true.

If you are in this place now, here is an insight that can help you cope with such individuals: you can only control yourself, and you shouldn't think that someone else can do this for you. Let go of opinions that lower your self-esteem. Of course, you can cope with everything that depends on you. You can pass the test, quit smoking, and do sports regularly. Always look for opportunities to stay on the right track instead of allowing others to lead you astray.

Failure is not meant to define you; it's meant to refine you. ~ Jon Gordon, Daniel Decker

Almost every individual is used to linking defeats with their personality. But forgetting to water flowers or not managing to finish the marathon doesn't characterize anyone as good or bad. To be a leader in one's life is paying no mind to critics. You don't have to give up because someone says that your work and words are unworthy of attention. The person who feels right being mean to others definitely shouldn't have any impact on you. Be a leader—do your work and aim high.

People always say that hard times make us stronger. This is true, but only if a person learns from their problems and doesn't give up. Naturally, you will feel frustrated if something bad happens. It doesn't mean that every time one is in trouble, they have to be excited about it. But what a person can do is search for the lessons in each issue. The more lessons you learn, the more prepared you become to build your great future.

People are not that different—we think that failures define us, and we listen to the critics who think badly of us. But we have the strength to break free from such a mindset.

chapters.title: Love people for who they are
chapters.text:
What about relationships? Since they play nearly the most crucial role in our lives, people need to find balance in this sphere too. More often than not, couples like to compete with each other. One of them achieved success, be it a career or hobby, and the other one became jealous. This is a one-way ticket for love. Not supporting one's better half will inevitably result in a break-up. You would instead prefer a partner who is proud of your results than the one who hates it when you reach the top. So always be supportive, and don't compare yourself to your partner. You are not separate teams; you are on the same side.

Useful advice on leadership states that the leader has to appreciate team members for their personalities, not only for the work done. Dog owners don't love their pets for bringing their slippers or guarding the house. You don't love someone for how they can serve you. You love someone for what their individuality is. You should also treat your teammates with respect for their personal characteristics. A person can be the most effective worker in the company, and they undoubtedly would appreciate that someone values their work. However, praising them exceptionally for their job skills may hurt the individual.

One person in pursuit of excellence raises the standards of everyone around them. ~ Jon Gordon, Daniel Decker

Stay strong in pursuing your goals. Even if you lose something on the way to success, you will gain much more with time. Failures are not the indicators that your personality isn't refined enough for happiness and realization. Be attentive to your mistakes and defeats, approaching them with the mindset of a learner. Yes, you will make more mistakes in the future. So what? You become the best version of yourself after every misstep.

Don't underestimate the power of the dream. If you have one, this means that you have enough energy to at least try to go after it. There will be plenty of challenges, pleasant and unpleasant surprises, and critics, but your efforts and urge are what help you break through the circumstances.

Dreams serve as a driving force: we plunge into self-development, meet new people, and learn a lot while making the dreams come true.

chapters.title: Talent is not enough for success
chapters.text:
We all know that gossiping is not a decent thing to do. But what if there was a way to gossip that would positively influence you and a person you discuss? This can happen if you talk about someone’s positive traits instead of negative ones. For example, you like how someone tells stories, makes coffee, or generates great ideas. Why not express your admiration to a colleague or a friend instead of focusing on negative aspects of people around you? Perhaps your warm words will favor the development of one's career when they reach your boss.

Don't worry about your greatness in the future. Just be great today! ~ Jon Gordon, Daniel Decker

Putting too much pressure on oneself about the future will lead to frustration. It is useful to make long-term plans, but your concentration should be focused on the present. Doing your best today means that you will be in the process of constant self-development. Let's consider using an example of healthy eating. Imagine that every day during a month, you don't eat products containing sugar and include more vegetables in your diet. You develop self-control and struggle with your habits daily. In a month, you will notice that you healthily lost some weight and, maybe, even started to feel better. A long-term goal could be to “become more healthy” or “lose weight.” But you achieved it only by regular efforts.

What is special about successful people? Have you ever watched their interviews and thought, “They are just like me. What did they do differently to get there?” The secret is both simple and challenging. Individuals who got ahead did ordinary things but with an extraordinary amount of work and commitment. So, you don't necessarily need to come up with a unique procedure of objective pursuit. Just stay persistent enough and remember that hard work is 80% of success.

“Do what you love” isn't just some idealistic suggestion created in the 21st century. It actually helps you to become not only happier but more acknowledged as a professional. Try to find work and hobbies that inspire you since that will make you more focused and interested in what you are doing.

It is true that talent won't get you success without hard work.

chapters.title: Steps to obtain more positivity
chapters.text:
Have you ever felt miserable for a long period of time? Except for really tragic events, you may feel frustrated because of your own thoughts. Often, individuals think about what others have, feeling deprived of something important. For instance, if you are single, you may look at happy couples and feel depressed because you don't have a partner. You may also be in a relationship, look at single people, and think how free of any responsibilities they are. In both situations, you don't value what you have, be it your freedom or a partner.

One more mistake that you can make is thinking about your weaknesses. We all want to be super productive, invincible, and energetic 24/7. But it is not possible if you are not a robot. Appreciate that you get tired, can be lazy, and feel disappointed because of some people. This is normal. What isn't okay is when you are either unproductive or extremely productive all the time. The first will never get you to a place you want to reach, while the second will cause burnout.

What can you do to become more positive and satisfied with your life?

1. Think about what you can be thankful for—warm relationships with family, friends, your other half, the job you enjoy, healthy environment at work, lovely smile, and great jokes? Anything will work. Start concentrating on these aspects when you feel like your life isn't good enough.

2. Pay more attention to your strong points. Trying to reduce weaknesses is worth respect, but thinking exceptionally about disadvantages will eventually lower your self-esteem.

3. Appreciate the advantages others have. This will help you see more positive sides in people.

Most likely, you have several fears about your future. You may have a dream that seems unattainable, and you are not confident in your abilities to get there. However, your fears are actually the opportunities to develop. For instance, let’s say you are scared of becoming an artist because you think you are not talented enough or that your style won't be unique. Now, take this fear and turn it into an opportunity. You will gain so much experience in the hobby you are really interested in. You will learn many different styles and choose the one that fits you most. You will meet many interesting people who can be your mentors. Does it look that bad now after transforming your concerns?

Whenever you fear that you will fail at something, think about the experience you can obtain if you overcame your anxiety.

chapters.title: Let yourself stand out from the crowd
chapters.text:
Have you ever thought that your goal seems so unattainable that you would rather not try achieving it? As it turns out, the price you pay for going after your dreams is lower than the cost of never attempting to do so. Fear will accompany you at the first stages of goal implementation, and it’s totally fine. Who wouldn’t be afraid of stepping into the unknown? But the more faith and actions you contribute to your ideas, the more structured the future you will see.

However, be careful if you try to achieve some materialistic objectives. Of course, money will bring you some sort of happiness, but it would, more likely, be a short-term happiness. Genuine happiness comes from giving. Be kind to others, share what you have, and put love in your actions. As you might have noticed, focus plays a crucial role in becoming a positive person. By focusing on what you have, you don’t feel deprived of something important. The practice of giving helps to shift your attention from the things you don’t have to those you do have.

Charity makes people happier because they helped someone and realize how much they have to share.

One more precaution on the way to success—don’t cherish your possessions more than people. Things deteriorate and lose their value fast, but the right people will be with you for a long time if you let them. What’s the pleasure of sitting alone in a palace made of gold? It’s always about the people. You should support them in their ideas and downfalls as well as they support you. Make them feel valued and loved. Express your faith in their future success. Being a good friend is a part of the path to happiness.

While doing what matters to you, don’t try to copy others. Their individualities may seem perfect, and you will be tempted to adopt their features. Unfortunately, this will kill your uniqueness. You cannot see yourself through the eyes of other people, and that’s why you don’t recognize how charismatic and uncommon you are.

Don’t be afraid to commit first. It’s often hard to make the first step when it comes to socializing with people and, especially, committing to them. But being sincere, caring, and kind will open up others, and you will see how your initiative bears the fruit of true friendship or team cooperation.

Did you know? Sport makes your body release endorphins, the hormones of happiness. So, whenever you feel down, just do some exercises.

chapters.title: Conclusion
chapters.text:
It’s in our human nature to think negatively about ourselves. Some individuals believe that such an approach helps self-development by pushing a person to fix all their issues. However, it will instead make people consider themselves worse than they are in reality. Naturally, you don’t want to feel miserable because your life and personality don’t coincide with your expectations. It’s essential to train yourself to turn to the light in moments of despair. When you notice that all your attention is focused on your weaknesses and failures, force yourself to appreciate all the pleasant sides of your world. Reflect on the strengths you have and remember all the moments when you were happy, valued, and heard. This will thrust forward the healing process from all the harm caused by unfavorable ideas about your life.

Loved ones cannot always be around you to help, but that's not a problem because you can rescue yourself from the sea of uncertainty, pessimism, and fears. The path will be thorny, but you are strong enough to overcome all the obstacles. You will have doubts, for sure, but it is normal for all human beings. The secret of successful people is not in the absence of hesitation; it is in how they cope with their thoughts. You should believe that a great future expects you. To achieve it, you will need to be hardworking and committed. No matter how much you fail, keep going, and you won’t even notice how fast your life will transform for the better.

Try this

1. When you start plunging into negative thoughts, put as much effort as you can into thinking about the positive sides of your life.

2. When you are in high spirits, make a list of things you are grateful for and what you like about yourself. Then read it in the moments you feel down.

3. Try to find a couple of hobbies. If something doesn’t go well with one of them (for instance, you couldn’t do that dance move right), you can always enjoy better results in another (you succeeded in playing the song on the guitar). This approach helps you always feel good about yourself.

Read it till the end?
